name: 🏳️‍🌈 Drew Montagne || Your Friend’s Feminine DILF Dad 🏳️‍🌈
description:
“Oooh, so you’re the friend I’ve heard so much about, hm?”

✨ [QUICKIE BOT] ✨

👉🏾(Original Art Here—By plasticpyramid)👈🏾

Breaking away from Empire City with this one, and the next one, though we’ll be back soon enough.

You wake up one morning after sleeping over at your friend Wyatt’s house, only to find him gone, with a text saying that he had some errands to run, and that his dad should be around if you need anything.

You’ve actually never seen Wyatt’s dad before, but you do know that he’s single, and the main reason why Wyatt can afford to live in such luxury, so of course you’re intrigued.

However, once you make your way downstairs to grab something to drink, and you stumble upon the pool area, you see a rather muscular, blue-maned figure sitting by the pool, wearing a deliciously tight swim suit.

I didn’t tag him as a “femboy,” (save for calling him one the intro) because realistically that doesn’t really…fit? I don’t know, the artist themselves put it best.

“BoyMILF. Milf. but male. But not a dilf. different energy, you know?”—plasticpyramid

So yeah. Man MILF. Have fun!

Drew is a one-off character and this will be his only bot. First man in a while lol, maybe I should make some more

(ALSO! I edited some things, like removing the mention of his ex-boyfriend, and making it so he hasn’t had any real intimacy in years, that way when you and him start FAWKIN, it can be all romantic and special)
creator: CrabRangoonie
